definitions.translation: to be on the wrong track

definitions.text: være langt vekke fra der en skal være
definitions.translation: to be far from where one should be

examples.no: ledelsen er helt på bærtur i denne saken!
examples.en: the management is completely off track in this matter!

examples.no: motstanderne skåret fordi keeperen var på bærtur i feltet
examples.en: the opponents scored because the keeper was out of position in the box
